title: The Adventures of Toto – Easy SAQs

questions.question: Who is Toto?
questions.answer: Toto is a mischievous monkey bought by the narrator’s grandfather.

questions.question: Who bought Toto and from whom?
questions.answer: Grandfather bought Toto from a tonga-driver.

questions.question: How much did Grandfather pay for Toto?
questions.answer: Grandfather paid five rupees for Toto.

questions.question: Why did Grandfather decide to keep Toto?
questions.answer: Grandfather kept Toto because he loved animals and wanted him in his private zoo.

questions.question: Why was Toto kept secretly in the beginning?
questions.answer: Toto was kept secretly because Grandmother disliked new animals in the house.

questions.question: Where was Toto first kept in the house?
questions.answer: Toto was first kept in a closet in the narrator’s bedroom.

questions.question: What damage did Toto cause in the closet?
questions.answer: Toto tore the wallpaper and shredded the narrator’s blazer.

questions.question: Where was Toto moved later?
questions.answer: Toto was moved to a cage in the servants’ quarters.

questions.question: Why did Grandfather take Toto to Saharanpur?
questions.answer: Grandfather took Toto to Saharanpur to collect his pension.

questions.question: How was Toto carried during the train journey?
questions.answer: Toto was carried in a large black canvas kit-bag.

questions.question: Why did the ticket collector call Toto a dog?
questions.answer: The ticket collector called Toto a dog because he charged fare for animals like dogs.

questions.question: How much fare did Grandfather pay for Toto?
questions.answer: Grandfather paid three rupees as fare for Toto.

questions.question: Who was Nana?
questions.answer: Nana was the family donkey living in the stable.

questions.question: What did Toto do to Nana?
questions.answer: Toto bit Nana’s ears with his sharp teeth.

questions.question: What did Toto enjoy during winter evenings?
questions.answer: Toto enjoyed taking a warm bath.

questions.question: How did Toto test the water before bathing?
questions.answer: He tested the water with his hand.

questions.question: What did Toto use while bathing?
questions.answer: Toto used soap while bathing.

questions.question: What dangerous thing did Toto do in the kitchen?
questions.answer: Toto jumped into a kettle of hot water.

questions.question: Who saved Toto from the boiling kettle?
questions.answer: Grandmother saved Toto.

questions.question: What did Toto steal from the dining table?
questions.answer: Toto stole a dish of pullao.

questions.question: Where did Toto go with the dish of pullao?
questions.answer: Toto climbed onto a jackfruit tree with the dish.

questions.question: Why did Toto stay in the tree for a long time?
questions.answer: He wanted to finish eating all the rice.

questions.question: What did Toto do with the dish after eating the rice?
questions.answer: He threw the dish down from the tree.

questions.question: Why was Toto finally sold?
questions.answer: Toto was sold because he caused too much damage in the house.

questions.question: For how much was Toto sold back to the tonga-driver?
questions.answer: Toto was sold back for three rupees.
